## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.020 — “Flammable liquid” defined.

“Flammable liquid” means any liquid which has a flash point of 70 ° F., or less, as determined by a tagliabue or equivalent closed-cup test device.

subsections.text: “Flammable liquid” means any liquid which has a flash point of 70 ° F., or less, as determined by a tagliabue or equivalent closed-cup test device.
